images.revised_prompt:
Create a 1:1 Amazon-style lifestyle ecommerce product poster using the provided reference image as the exact source for the product: a silver stainless steel multifunctional foldable golf knife/keychain tool. Place the product on a clean, realistic golf green beside a white golf ball and a wooden tee. Premium outdoor golf-course atmosphere, attractive natural sunlight, shallow depth of field with soft blurred fairway/background, polished commercial composition, clean premium layout, strong visual hierarchy, product as clear hero subject.

The product must match the reference exactly: silver brushed stainless steel body, black brush end, three black slots on the handle, visible keychain ring and chain, foldable knife blade, divot fork/prong tool, layered foldable tools, no logo. Preserve its shape, texture, proportions, parts, and orientation as faithfully as possible. Do not include a gold variant.

No visible text despite modern poster styling. No Chinese, QR codes, watermarks, manufacturer info, supplier info, platform marks, contact info, website URLs, price info. Absolutely no watermark-like symbols, sparkle marks, signature marks, corner icons, decorative generated marks, or extra graphic symbols anywhere. Clean realistic commercial product photography, high-converting Amazon ecommerce image.
